stomach_abdomen.text: Griping pain, with great rumbling, nausea, and liquid feces. Flatulent colic

stool_rectum.text: Interior of anus studded with itching eminence. Hæmorrhoids. Liquid feces

urinary.text: Painful constriction at neck of bladder

female.text: Aching pains in hips and loins. Sensation as if hips were being drawn together. Sensation of weight and tension within pelvis. Shooting pains through breasts. Amenorrhœa

skin.text: Superficial ulcers and sores on lower extremities, especially in females at climacteric

keynotes.text: color="#800000">POLYGONUM HYDROPIPEROIDES Hydropiper - Smartweed (POLYGONUM PUNCTATUM) Metrorrhagia, also Amenorrhœa in young girls. Varicosis; hæmorrhoids and rectal pockets. Burning in stomach followed by feeling of coldness in the pit of the stomach.
